content:
MODULE: cosmos.ui.visualizations
FILE: cosmos/ui/visualizations.py (903 lines)
CATEGORY: ui

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Visualizations - Advanced Data Visualization Components

Provides interactive visualizations for:
- Memory activation heatmaps
- Knowledge graph exploration
- Evolution fitness timelines
- Agent swarm activity

Novel Features:
- Real-time memory access patterns
- Interactive entity relationsh

CLASSES:
- VisualizationConfig: Configuration for visualizations.
- MemoryVisualizer: Visualization components for the memory system.

Provides:
- Memory access heatm
  Methods: def create_access_heatmap(self, access_data: list[dict], time_buckets: int=24) -> Optional[go.Figure
  Methods: def create_importance_distribution(self, memories: list[dict]) -> Optional[go.Figure]
  Methods: def create_temporal_view(self, memories: list[dict], days: int=30) -> Optional[go.Figure]
  Methods: def create_source_pie(self, source_counts: dict[str, int]) -> Optional[go.Figure]
- GraphVisualizer: Visualization components for the knowledge graph.

Provides:
- Interactive node-
  Methods: def create_network_graph(self, entities: list[dict], relationships: list[dict], layout: str='spring'
  Methods: def create_entity_type_chart(self, type_counts: dict[str, int]) -> Optional[go.Figure]
- EvolutionVisualizer: Visualization components for the evolution system.

Provides:
- Fitness timeline
  Methods: def create_fitness_timeline(self, fitness_history: list[dict]) -> Optional[go.Figure]
  Methods: def create_metric_radar(self, metrics: dict[str, float]) -> Optional[go.Figure]
  Methods: def create_pareto_front(self, population: list[dict]) -> Optional[go.Figure]
  Methods: def create_generation_boxplot(self, generation_data: list[dict]) -> Optional[go.Figure]
- AgentVisualizer: Visualization components for agent monitoring.

Provides:
- Agent activity timel
  Methods: def create_activity_timeline(self, activity_logs: list[dict]) -> Optional[go.Figure]
  Methods: def create_task_distribution(self, task_counts: dict[str, int]) -> Optional[go.Figure]
  Methods: def create_performance_comparison(self, agent_metrics: list[dict]) -> Optional[go.Figure]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_dashboard_figures(memory_data: Optional[dict]=None, graph_data: Optional[dict]=None, evolution_data: Optional
